metadata.title: Truth Gate Protocol: Bounded Rationality and Semantic Containment in Intelligent Systems
metadata.description: The Truth Gate Protocol addresses the problem of unbounded rationalization in AI systems by introducing a formal containment mechanism that constrains system outputs to provably-grounded inputs. We define the Truth Gate as a semantic filter operating at the Informational layer, requiring all outbound assertions to trace a verifiable path back to constrained sensor inputs or audited reasoning chains. This paper provides the formal specification, enforcement architecture, and use cases for semantic containment in production AI deployments.

title: Truth Gate Protocol: Bounded Rationality and Semantic Containment in Intelligent Systems
